description: Bootstrap managed-worktree-system repository and move the initial design document into it
Write an implementation specification for managed-worktree-system based on deeper review of existing systems
Implement initial managed-worktree-system CLI and core v1 commands from the implementation spec
Complete managed-worktree-system CLI to production-ready v1 by implementing real dry-run planning, lock/lease concurrency control, functional flag semantics, and publish/install delivery readiness
Prepare managed-worktree-system for public release, npm publishing, operations docs, and worktree usage rules
Fix local npm auth configuration for public package reads and document recommended managed-worktree workspace topology
Change mwt from bare-backed seed to non-bare seed and clarify deliver/verify semantics
Expose managed-worktree-system APIs and manager-specific task naming needed for workspace-agent-hub integration
Initialize submodules in managed worktree task checkouts and remove the compose-agentsmd pre-commit fallback
Teach mwt doctor --fix --deep to remove orphan empty sibling task directories and verify the self-heal path
Make mwt cleanup paths finish best-effort after internal step failures
Add structured incomplete error reporting to mwt doctor --fix
Fix mwt Windows orphan worktree cleanup so prune/doctor recover from transient EBUSY without leaving opaque residue
Release managed-worktree-system 2.2.7 with the Windows cleanup recovery fix
Ensure mwt create documents and verifies task worktree submodule setup
Mechanise CWD-holder refusal in mwt prune/drop and add global rules banning operation on other-owned worktrees
Improve managed-worktree-system CLI first-run discoverability from --help
Fix mwt init verify config handling and cleanup behavior
